ontology.description: Municipal code ontology for KG extraction, frame logic, deontic logic, TDFOL, DCEC, and permit/workflow reasoning.

llm_derivation.rationale: Added only concepts directly evidenced in the supplied code samples: complaint workflow, franchise instruments, utility services, explicit time-limit logic, and access-restriction sanctions (ejection/exclusion). Existing ontology structure was preserved by extending with minimal subclasses and high-signal relations to support deontic/temporal workflow reasoning (obligations, prohibitions, permissions, deadlines) without introducing speculative terms.
